title: rosa × dumetorum f. semiglabra
intro: Rosa × dumetorum f. semiglabra is a variant of the Rosa dumetorum, a hybrid rose species known for its unique characteristics. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been shown to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. Rosa × dumetorum f. semiglabra has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, offering benefits such as improved digestion, reduced inflammation, and enhanced immune function. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and health.
